channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The influence of social media misinformation and its risks to stability in Tanzania
item.description: The article, written by Peter Norman, explores the increasing influence of social media on public opinion and the growing risks it brings to social stability, especially in African societies like Tanz...

item.title: Artemis Crew Observes Moon's Vast Canyon During Historic Lunar Mission
item.description: NASA's Artemis mission has recently given astronauts a chance to observe one of the Moon's most striking features, informally known as the Moon's 'Grand Canyon.' The observation occurred just before a...

item.title: Telkom Kenya Scores Below Required Service Quality Benchmarks, CA Report Shows
item.description: Telkom Kenya has been reported to fall short of the minimum service quality standards set by the Communications Authority of Kenya (CA), scoring only 52.76 percent against the 80 percent benchmark. Th...

item.title: Polymarket removes controversial bets on Air Force rescue
item.description: Polymarket, a prediction market platform, recently removed bets concerning the rescue of U.S. Air Force personnel shot down over Iran, following public criticism from Representative Seth Moulton. Moul...

item.title: KRA and Mombasa traders in dispute over clearance of Chinese imports
item.description: In Mombasa, a heated dispute has arisen between the Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) and local traders following the detention of cargo imported from China. The goods, reportedly held at the port, have s...

item.title: $27 Million Refund Scam Ring Exposed Following Undercover YouTube Investigation
item.description: A criminal organization defrauded over 2,000 elderly individuals of more than $27 million between 2021 and 2023, using a combination of tech support, bank impersonation, and refund scams. Victims, mos...

item.title: India extends humanitarian assistance to Afghanistan hit by recent floods and earthquake
item.description: New Delhi: In a gesture of solidarity, India has dispatched humanitarian assistance and disaster relief (HADR) materials to Afghanistan, which is facing severe challenges due to recent floods and a po...

item.title: Cape Flats children targeted by gangs through incentives like food and shoes
item.description: In the Cape Flats, gang activity is increasingly drawing children into criminal behaviour, sometimes as young as five years old. Community leaders have reported that youngsters are being persuaded or ...

item.title: Family mourns death of 13-year-old Noah Campbell following tragic Flitwick collision; two people charged
item.description: A 13-year-old boy, Noah Campbell, has died following a tragic crash in Flitwick, Bedfordshire, on Friday night involving a car and three teenage boys — two riding bicycles and one on a scooter. Bedfor...

item.title: Marjorie Taylor Greene Criticizes Trump for Threatening Iran in Easter Social Media Post
item.description: Former U.S. Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene publicly condemned former President Donald Trump for a controversial social media post made on Easter Sunday, in which he issued threats toward Iran. ...

item.title: Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma and Wife Reject Allegations of Multiple Passports, Legal Action Planned
item.description: Ahead of the Assam assembly elections, a political controversy has emerged regarding the Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma and his wife, Riniki Bhuyan Sharma. Congress leader Pawan Khera alleged that...

item.title: Carol Kirkwood bids farewell to BBC after decades on air
item.description: Carol Kirkwood, a familiar face of BBC Weather since 1998, has concluded her long-standing tenure at the BBC, presenting her final shift on BBC Breakfast. Over the years, Kirkwood became renowned for ...

item.title: Iran and India to Strengthen Cooperation on Chabahar Port After Regional War, Says Envoy
item.description: Iran’s ambassador to India, Mohammad Fathali, has expressed confidence that the strategic Chabahar Port project between Iran and India will accelerate its expansion once the ongoing conflicts in West ...

item.title: Nigerian security leaders call for end to ethnic profiling, urge inclusive language for unity and peace
item.description: High-ranking Nigerian security officers and policy experts from Beacon Security and Intelligence Limited (BSIL) and the Whiteink Institute for Strategy Education and Research (WISER) don gather for Ab...

item.title: NDDC and Niger Delta Chamber Leaders Call for More Local Investment to Boost Regional GDP
item.description: The Chairman of the Niger Delta Chamber of Commerce, Trade, Mines and Agriculture (NDCCTMA), Ambassador Idaere Gogo Ogan, and the Managing Director of the Niger Delta Development Commission (NDDC), Dr...

item.title: Lawsuit Accuses San Bernardino Officer of Slamming Handcuffed Teen and Falsifying Reports
item.description: An 18-year-old woman, Erin Marie Cowser, has filed a civil rights lawsuit against the San Bernardino Police Department, accusing an officer of using excessive force and fabricating reports following a...

item.title: Artemis II Mission Follows Optimized Figure-Eight Trajectory for Safe Lunar Flyby and Return
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission, launched on April 2, 2026, aboard the Space Launch System rocket, carried four astronauts—Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Jeremy Hansen—beyond low Earth orb...

item.title: Arsenal Lose FA Cup Quarter-Final to Southampton, Miss Out on Prize Money
item.description: Arsenal suffered a major disappointment after being knocked out of the FA Cup by Southampton in the quarter-final stage on April 4, 2026. The Premier League leaders were defeated at St. Mary's Stadium...

item.title: Air Canada to Implement $50 Fuel Surcharge on Select Vacation Packages from April 6
item.description: Air Canada Vacations, the airline's holiday package subsidiary, will introduce a $50 fuel surcharge per passenger for trips to designated sunny destinations starting April 6, 2026. This surcharge, whi...

item.title: NDLEA arrests Celestial Church pastor and wife for transporting 11kg of skunk in Lagos
item.description: For Lagos, NDLEA don arrest Pastor Afolabi Hodonu, 45, leader of Celestial Church of Christ at Agonvi Sea Beach, Sakpo area, Badagry, and him wife, Success Hodonu, 35, after 11 kilograms of skunk cann...
